rationale: Educ. Code §33.254 is a sunset provision for a council under the Texas Sunset Act. It bears no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The council is subject to Chapter 325, Government Code (Texas Sunset Act). Unless continued in existence as provided by that chapter, the council is abolished and this subchapter expires September 1, 2029.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns sunset review of a council, not property tax exemptions.
